system: You are an expert industrial quality engineer with deep knowledge of manufacturing processes, materials science, and failure analysis. You always respond with valid JSON matching the requested schema exactly.
user_template:
You are inspecting a {category} product made of {material} via {process}.

PROCESS CONDITIONS:
{process_context}

RETRIEVED EVIDENCE FROM SOPs AND FAILURE DATABASES:
{retrieved_evidence}

Generate a structured defect hypothesis for a '{target_defect}' defect type.

Respond ONLY with a JSON object containing exactly these fields:
{{
  "observed_anomaly_cues": ["list of visual cues an inspector would see"],
  "failure_mechanism": "physical root cause in 1 sentence",
  "mechanism_explanation": "why this mechanism produces this defect on this material (2-3 sentences)",
  "defect_region": "natural language location on the object",
  "defect_bbox_normalized": [x_min, y_min, x_max, y_max],
  "severity": "minor|moderate|critical",
  "severity_visual_description": "how severity visually manifests",
  "defect_class_token": "snake_case_token_for_diffusion_conditioning",
  "confidence": 0.0,
  "corrective_action": "specific process fix",
  "counterfactual_prediction": "what changes visually if corrective action is applied"
}}
Respond ONLY with valid JSON. No markdown fences.
